# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Simple CloudFormation template to launch EC2 instances with EBS volumes.

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-0c55b159cbfafe1f0  # Replace with your desired AMI ID
      KeyName: my-key-pair            # Replace with your key pair name
      SubnetId: subnet-12345678       # Replace with your subnet ID
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref MySecurityGroup

      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdh
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20                  # Size in GB
            VolumeType: gp2                  # General Purpose SSD
            DeleteOnTermination: true

  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: vpc-12345678                # Replace with your VPC ID
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0              # Replace with your desired CIDR block

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: The Instance ID
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance

  InstancePublicIP:
    Description: Public IP of the instance
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIp
